metadata.description: The Azure region where resources will be created.
The name of the resource group.
Workload token used in CAF resource names (the <workload> segment).
Environment token used in CAF resource names, e.g. dev or prod.
Region abbreviation used in CAF resource names, e.g. wus2 for westus2.
The object ID of the Entra ID user or group that will be the SQL administrator.
The UPN or display name of the SQL Entra ID administrator.
The object ID of the principal running the deployment (granted Key Vault Administrator for initial setup).
The App Service Plan SKU. F1 = free (dev), B1 = basic always-on (prod).
Whether to deploy the demo static web app.
Number of days to retain logs in the Log Analytics workspace. Use 30 for dev, 90 for prod.
Email address that receives oncall alert notifications from Azure Monitor.
The GitHub repository (owner/name) whose Actions runs may deploy via OIDC.
The git branch whose Actions runs may deploy via OIDC.
External ID instance/authority host, e.g. https://your-tenant.ciamlogin.com.
External ID domain, e.g. your-tenant.onmicrosoft.com (used to build the authority URL).
App registration (client) ID of the API — used as the JWT audience.
B2C sign-up/sign-in policy (user flow) ID. Leave empty for Entra External ID, which has no policy segment.
Expected token issuer, e.g. https://your-tenant.ciamlogin.com/<tenant-id>/v2.0/.
App registration (client) ID of the Nuxt web app for the OIDC sign-in flow.
External ID tenant subdomain for the web app, e.g. gatherstead (→ gatherstead.ciamlogin.com).
API scope the web app requests so its access token is audienced for the API, e.g. api://<api-client-id>/access_as_user.
The Azure region where the managed identity will be created.
Workload token used in CAF resource names.
Environment token used in CAF resource names.
Region abbreviation used in CAF resource names.
The Azure region where the managed identity will be created.
Workload token used in CAF resource names.
Environment token used in CAF resource names.
Region abbreviation used in CAF resource names.
The Azure region for observability resources.
Workload token used in CAF resource names.
Environment token used in CAF resource names.
Region abbreviation used in CAF resource names.
Number of days to retain logs in the workspace. Use 30 for dev, 90 for prod.
Email address for oncall alert notifications.
Principal ID of the app managed identity (granted Monitoring Metrics Publisher on App Insights).
Whether to provision a separate App Insights component for the demo static site.

properties.description: API failed request count exceeded threshold — investigate recent deployments or errors.
Dependency failure count (SQL, Key Vault, etc.) exceeded threshold — may indicate downstream outage.

metadata.description: The Azure region where the Key Vault will be created.
Workload token used in CAF resource names.
Environment token used in CAF resource names.
Region abbreviation used in CAF resource names.
Short deterministic suffix ensuring the globally-unique Key Vault name is free.
The principal ID of the app managed identity (granted Crypto User + Secrets User).
The principal ID of the web managed identity (granted Secrets User for the NUXT_SESSION_PASSWORD reference).
The object ID of the deployer (granted Key Vault Administrator for initial setup).
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for diagnostic settings.
The Azure region where SQL resources will be created.
Workload token used in CAF resource names.
Environment token used in CAF resource names.
Region abbreviation used in CAF resource names.
Short deterministic suffix ensuring the globally-unique SQL server name is free.
The object ID of the Entra ID user or group that will be the SQL administrator.
The UPN or display name of the SQL Entra ID administrator.
The tenant ID for Entra ID authentication.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for diagnostic settings.
The Azure region where App Service resources will be created.
Workload token used in CAF resource names.
Environment token used in CAF resource names.
Region abbreviation used in CAF resource names.
Short deterministic suffix ensuring the globally-unique App Service names are free.
The App Service Plan SKU. Use F1 for dev (free) or B1 for prod (basic, always-on).
Full resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity to attach to the API app.
Client ID of the managed identity — set as AZURE_CLIENT_ID so DefaultAzureCredential selects the correct identity.
Fully qualified domain name of the SQL server.
Name of the SQL database.
URI of the Key Vault instance.
Resource ID of the Log Analytics workspace for diagnostic settings.
Application Insights connection string injected into both apps.
External ID instance/authority host, e.g. https://your-tenant.ciamlogin.com.
External ID domain, e.g. your-tenant.onmicrosoft.com.
App registration (client) ID of the API — used as the JWT audience.
B2C sign-up/sign-in policy (user flow) ID. Empty for Entra External ID.
Expected token issuer, e.g. https://your-tenant.ciamlogin.com/<tenant-id>/v2.0/.
Full resource ID of the dedicated web managed identity (used for Key Vault references).
App registration (client) ID of the Nuxt web app for the OIDC sign-in flow.
External ID tenant subdomain for the web app, e.g. gatherstead (→ gatherstead.ciamlogin.com).
The API scope the web app requests so its access token is audienced for the API, e.g. api://<api-client-id>/access_as_user.

variables.connectionString: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Database={1};Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity;User Id={2};Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;Column Encryption Setting=Enabled;', parameters('sqlServerFqdn'), parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), parameters('appManagedIdentityClientId'))]

metadata.description: The Azure region where the CI managed identity will be created.
Workload token used in CAF resource names.
Environment token used in CAF resource names.
Region abbreviation used in CAF resource names.
The GitHub repository (owner/name) allowed to federate with this identity.
The git branch whose workflow runs may assume this identity.
The Azure region for the Static Web App.
Workload token used in CAF resource names.
Environment token used in CAF resource names.
Region abbreviation used in CAF resource names.
Principal ID of the CI managed identity, granted Contributor so the pipeline can fetch the SWA deployment token at runtime.

resources.name: [guid(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/staticSites', format('stapp-{0}-demo-{1}-{2}', parameters('workload'), parameters('environment'), parameters('locationAbbreviation'))), parameters('ciIdentityPrincipalId'), variables('contributorRoleId'))]
